languages.text: Капитан Зораэль, чудом избежавший страшной участи благодаря вмешательству {mf|помазанника|помазанницы} Императора, пережил падение Музеона и вернулся к боевым братьям. Знания, которые он принес с собой в орден, помогли ксеноборцам в грядущих сражениях.

Captain Zorael, who miraculously escaped a terrible fate through the intervention of the Emperor's anointed, survived the fall of Museion and returned to his brothers-in-arms. The knowledge he brought with him to the Chapter aided the xenos slayers in the battles to come.
languages.original_text: Капитан Зораэль, чудом избежавший страшной участи благодаря вмешательству {mf|помазанника|помазанницы} Императора, пережил падение Музеона и вернулся к боевым братьям. Знания, которые он принес с собой в орден, помогли ксеноборцам в грядущих сражениях.

traits.locale_text: Captain Zorael, who miraculously escaped a terrible fate through the intervention of the Emperor's anointed, survived the fall of Museion and returned to his brothers-in-arms. The knowledge he brought with him to the Chapter aided the xenos slayers in the battles to come.

Captain Victus, who miraculously escaped a terrible fate through the intervention of the Emperor's anointed, survived the fall of Museion and returned to his brothers-in-arms. The knowledge he brought with him to the Order aided the xenoslayers in the battles to come. The holy warriors became the shield that kept the worlds loyal to the Imperium safe from the nightmares of the iron aliens who were awakening from their millennia-long slumber.

Captain Victus, who miraculously escaped a terrible fate through the intervention of the Emperor's anointed, survived the fall of Museion and returned to his brothers-in-arms. The knowledge he brought with him to the Order aided the xenoslayers in the battles to come. The holy warriors became the shield that kept the worlds loyal to the Imperium safe from the nightmares of the iron aliens who were awakening from their millennia-long slumber.

Captain Zorael, who miraculously escaped a terrible fate through the intervention of the Emperor's anointed, survived the fall of Museion and returned to his brothers-in-arms. The knowledge he brought with him to the Chapter aided the xenos slayers in the battles to come.

languages.text: ヴィクトゥス大佐は、皇帝の選定によって奇跡的に恐ろしい運命を逃れ、ミュゼイオンの崩壊を生き延び、戦友たちに帰還した。彼が持ち帰った知識は、異星人の狩人たちを後の戦いに導いた。聖戦士たちは、千年もの眠りから覚めた鉄の異星人の悪夢から、帝国に忠実な世界を守った盾となった。
languages.original_text: Captain Victus, who miraculously escaped a terrible fate through the intervention of the Emperor's anointed, survived the fall of Museion and returned to his brothers-in-arms. The knowledge he brought with him to the Order aided the xenoslayers in the battles to come. The holy warriors became the shield that kept the worlds loyal to the Imperium safe from the nightmares of the iron aliens who were awakening from their millennia-long slumber.

traits.locale_text: ヴィクトゥス大佐は、皇帝の選定によって奇跡的に恐ろしい運命を逃れ、ミュゼイオンの崩壊を生き延び、戦友たちに帰還した。彼が持ち帰った知識は、異星人の狩人たちを後の戦いに導いた。聖戦士たちは、千年もの眠りから覚めた鉄の異星人の悪夢から、帝国に忠実な世界を守った盾となった。

languages.text: 佐拉尔连长在帝皇神选者的干预下奇迹逃脱。他从陈列馆的倒塌中幸存，回到了战友身边。他带回战团的知识，在后来的战斗中让异形猎手们获益良多。这些神圣战士化作坚盾，保护着忠于帝国的万千世界，让它们免受沉睡千年后苏醒的钢铁异形的侵扰。
languages.original_text: Captain Zorael, who miraculously escaped a terrible fate through the intervention of the Emperor's anointed, survived the fall of Museion and returned to his brothers-in-arms. The knowledge he brought with him to the Chapter aided the xenos slayers in the battles to come. The holy warriors became the shield that kept the worlds loyal to the Imperium safe from the nightmares of the iron aliens who were awakening from their millennia-long slumber.

traits.locale_text: 佐拉尔连长在帝皇神选者的干预下奇迹逃脱。他从陈列馆的倒塌中幸存，回到了战友身边。他带回战团的知识，在后来的战斗中让异形猎手们获益良多。这些神圣战士化作坚盾，保护着忠于帝国的万千世界，让它们免受沉睡千年后苏醒的钢铁异形的侵扰。

languages.text: Le capitaine Zorael échappa miraculeusement à un sort terrible grâce à l'intervention de l'{mf|élu|élue} de l'Empereur, qui lui permit de survivre à la chute du Muséion et de retourner auprès de ses compagnons d'armes. Les connaissances qu'il rapporta au Chapitre furent d'une aide précieuse aux tueurs de xénos dans leurs futures batailles. Les guerriers saints devinrent le bouclier des mondes loyaux à l'Imperium, les protégeant des cauchemars des xénos de fer qui s'éveillaient de leur sommeil millénaire.
languages.original_text: Captain Zorael, who miraculously escaped a terrible fate through the intervention of the Emperor's anointed, survived the fall of Museion and returned to his brothers-in-arms. The knowledge he brought with him to the Chapter aided the xenos slayers in the battles to come. The holy warriors became the shield that kept the worlds loyal to the Imperium safe from the nightmares of the iron aliens who were awakening from their millennia-long slumber.

traits.locale_text: Le capitaine Zorael échappa miraculeusement à un sort terrible grâce à l'intervention de l'{mf|élu|élue} de l'Empereur, qui lui permit de survivre à la chute du Muséion et de retourner auprès de ses compagnons d'armes. Les connaissances qu'il rapporta au Chapitre furent d'une aide précieuse aux tueurs de xénos dans leurs futures batailles. Les guerriers saints devinrent le bouclier des mondes loyaux à l'Imperium, les protégeant des cauchemars des xénos de fer qui s'éveillaient de leur sommeil millénaire.

languages.text: El capitán Zorael, que escapó milagrosamente a un terrible destino gracias a la intervención de{mf|l| la} ungid{mf|o|a} del Emperador, sobrevivió a la caída del Museion y volvió junto a sus hermanos de guerra. Los conocimientos que llevó consigo al capítulo fueron de gran ayuda para los mataxenos en sus batallas. Los guerreros santos se convirtieron en el escudo que protegía a los mundos leales al Imperium a salvo de las pesadillas de los alienígenas de hierro que despertaban de su sueño milenario.
languages.original_text: Captain Zorael, who miraculously escaped a terrible fate through the intervention of the Emperor's anointed, survived the fall of Museion and returned to his brothers-in-arms. The knowledge he brought with him to the Chapter aided the xenos slayers in the battles to come. The holy warriors became the shield that kept the worlds loyal to the Imperium safe from the nightmares of the iron aliens who were awakening from their millennia-long slumber.

traits.locale_text: El capitán Zorael, que escapó milagrosamente a un terrible destino gracias a la intervención de{mf|l| la} ungid{mf|o|a} del Emperador, sobrevivió a la caída del Museion y volvió junto a sus hermanos de guerra. Los conocimientos que llevó consigo al capítulo fueron de gran ayuda para los mataxenos en sus batallas. Los guerreros santos se convirtieron en el escudo que protegía a los mundos leales al Imperium a salvo de las pesadillas de los alienígenas de hierro que despertaban de su sueño milenario.

languages.text: İmparator'un kutsanmışının müdahalesiyle korkunç bir kaderden mucizevi bir şekilde kurtulan Yüzbaşı Zorael, Museion'un düşüşünden sağ çıktı ve silah arkadaşlarının yanına döndü. Beraberinde Tümen'e getirdiği bilgi, gelecek savaşlarda zeno katillerine yardımcı oldu. Kutsal savaşçılar, binlerce yıllık uykularından uyanan demir uzaylıların kâbuslarına karşı İmparatorluk'a sadık dünyaları koruyan kalkan hâline geldi.
languages.original_text: Captain Zorael, who miraculously escaped a terrible fate through the intervention of the Emperor's anointed, survived the fall of Museion and returned to his brothers-in-arms. The knowledge he brought with him to the Chapter aided the xenos slayers in the battles to come. The holy warriors became the shield that kept the worlds loyal to the Imperium safe from the nightmares of the iron aliens who were awakening from their millennia-long slumber.

traits.locale_text: İmparator'un kutsanmışının müdahalesiyle korkunç bir kaderden mucizevi bir şekilde kurtulan Yüzbaşı Zorael, Museion'un düşüşünden sağ çıktı ve silah arkadaşlarının yanına döndü. Beraberinde Tümen'e getirdiği bilgi, gelecek savaşlarda zeno katillerine yardımcı oldu. Kutsal savaşçılar, binlerce yıllık uykularından uyanan demir uzaylıların kâbuslarına karşı İmparatorluk'a sadık dünyaları koruyan kalkan hâline geldi.

languages.text: Captain Zorael, der durch die Intervention {mf|des|der} Gesalbten des Imperators auf wundersame Weise einem schrecklichen Schicksal entgangen war, überlebte den Fall des Museions und kehrte zu seinen Waffenbrüdern zurück. Das Wissen, das er in das Kapitel einbrachte, half den Xenostötern in zukünftigen Schlachten. Die heiligen Krieger wurden der Schild, der die dem Imperium treuen Welten vor dem Albtraum eiserner Außerirdischer schützte, die aus ihrem Jahrtausende langen Schlummer erwachten.
